fields.title: Migrate worked-for/ feature
fields.description:
Move worked-for to tau/src/worked-for/

## Source
- extensions/tau/src/worked-for.ts

## Target
- extensions/tau/src/worked-for/index.ts

## Changes
- Export initWorkedFor(pi, state) function
- Store timer state in shared state
- Keep /worked command
- Keep widget and separator rendering

## DoD
- Timer widget shows during agent runs
- Separator rendered after agent_end
- /worked on|off|toggle works
- /worked tools on|off|toggle works
fields.close_reason: Moved worked-for into vertical slice and wired enable/tool flags through TauState
